title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures weakly again，the main contract closed 888.5，an decrease of 0.78% throughout the day; some traderswere negative to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 891-895 yuan/mt; decreased 2-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
